00

About Me

"I didn't start from theory — I started from actually doing it."

My path into social media marketing wasn't mapped out — it was discovered in real time. At Aelfric Eden, I was posting content and immediately watching how small changes in hooks or storytelling could shift performance overnight. There was a moment when a video I'd reworked suddenly outperformed everything we'd posted before — and I realized that wasn't luck. It was pattern recognition.

Over four years, I built a workflow where creative instinct generates the idea, and data refines and scales it. I start by asking what feels culturally alive — what's the tension, the timing, the human truth behind a product — then use performance signals to sharpen and commit.

What draws me to clean beauty — and specifically to brands like ILIA — is how the category creates space for storytelling that's both educational and aspirational. Today's audience is informed and intentional. They're not just buying makeup; they're buying into a philosophy of transparency and skin-first beauty.

"The most satisfying moment in any campaign is when it stops feeling like internal work and becomes something visible in the market — where you can see people responding to the brand in real time."

EducationBA Media Studies + Journalism Minor, UC Berkeley
LocationLos Angeles, CA (Southern California)
SpecializationSocial-first content, creator IRM, campaign production
ApproachCreative instinct + data iteration — both, in sequence
CurrentlyDigital Content Analyst, Google (via VACO)
01

My Interests

✦

Clean Beauty & Skincare

I'm genuinely fascinated by the clean beauty movement — not just as a category, but as a cultural shift. The way brands like ILIA have built communities around transparency and skin-first philosophy reflects exactly the kind of values-led marketing I want to build.

◎

Social Media Psychology

What makes people stop scrolling? I've been obsessed with this question since my first viral post. I follow social platform algorithm updates, study hook patterns, and think constantly about the intersection of creativity, culture, and human attention.

◈

Visual Storytelling & Photography

Outside of work, I'm a photographer — shooting portraits, lifestyle, and graduation sessions across Los Angeles. The discipline of framing, light, and composition directly informs how I think about brand aesthetics and social content creation.

Project Highlights

Project 01

TikTok Growth Engine

Aelfric Eden · 2020–2024

Built a full platform-native TikTok strategy from scratch — Social SEO architecture, hook testing framework, trend-responsive content pillars, and creator collaboration workflow. Grew a dormant channel into a leading streetwear voice.

1.2K → 641K+42% reach+35% completion

Project 02

Pop-Up & Event Campaigns

Aelfric Eden · Melrose & ComplexCon

End-to-end production ownership — from creative concept and influencer coordination to on-site visual merchandising and real-time social publishing. Each event delivered measurable foot traffic and social amplification.

+28% foot traffic15K+ impressions100+ creators

Project 03

Marvel & Netflix Campaigns

Cantina Creative · 2023

Introduced Instagram Reels strategy to a high-end VFX studio's social presence. Drove analytics-led iteration across multi-platform campaigns for two of the world's largest entertainment brands.

+40% engagementMulti-platform

Project 04

Influencer PR Seeding Workflow

Aelfric Eden · Ongoing

Designed and managed a high-efficiency end-to-end influencer workflow — sourcing, outreach, briefing, contracting, content approvals, and payment tracking for 100+ partnerships and agency collaborations.

100+ partnerships+18% referral traffic

Conversion Funnel Optimization
